room.caption: [NightmareB2] Okay, let's spice up the difficulty a little bit.

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Use the menu teleport function if it's too much for you." signSize=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=2 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=10
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=-2 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=10
objectUseN=oTrapProjectile spriteUseN=sSkelefire shootDelayN=65 atkPowerN=8 dirN=180 bulletSpeedN=7
